/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/benchmarks.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/benchmarks.dir/benchmarks/bench_all.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmarks.dir/benchmarks/bench_constructor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmarks.dir/benchmarks/bench_allocation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmarks.dir/benchmarks/bench_bulk_allocation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmarks.dir/benchmarks/bench_object_lifecycle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmarks.dir/benchmarks/bench_reset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmarks.dir/benchmarks/bench_throughput.cpp.o -o benchmarks
